# 📌 Step 2: `Import` modules

Import the random module so we can use it to get random words from our `words.txt` file.

<div style="background:#fffaf0; padding:15px; border-left:5px solid #FB8C00; margin:20px 0;">
<details>
<summary>📝 Test Code</summary>
```python
import urllib.request
url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ed-tq/Python-Word-Guessing-Console-Game/refs/heads/main/02-test.py"
with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as response:
    code = response.read().decode("utf-8")
exec(code)
```
</details>
</div>
